'''vahugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yabghu|yabghu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yabghu|yabghu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vahugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væhigith|væhigith]] || [[word:væhigij|væhigij]] || [[word:væhigish|væhigish]] || [[word:væhigi|væhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vahuhuguth|vahuhuguth]] || [[word:vahuhuguj|vahuhuguj]] || [[word:vahuhugush|vahuhugush]] || [[word:vahuhugu|vahuhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vahuguth|vahuguth]] || [[word:vahuguj|vahuguj]] || [[word:vahugush|vahugush]] || [[word:vahugu|vahugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vahufguth|vahufguth]] || [[word:vahufguj|vahufguj]] || [[word:vahufgush|vahufgush]] || [[word:vahufguf|vahufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vahuguthu|vahuguthu]] || [[word:vahuguju|vahuguju]] || [[word:vahugushu|vahugushu]] || [[word:vahuguku|vahuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vahuguth|vahuguth]] || [[word:vahuguj|vahuguj]] || [[word:vahugush|vahugush]] || [[word:vahugu|vahugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vahuguthul|vahuguthul]] || [[word:vahugujul|vahugujul]] || [[word:vahugushul|vahugushul]] || [[word:vahugukul|vahugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vahuguthuthu|vahuguthuthu]] || [[word:vahugujuju|vahugujuju]] || [[word:vahugushushu|vahugushushu]] || [[word:vahuguku|vahuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vahuguthun|vahuguthun]] || [[word:vahugujun|vahugujun]] || [[word:vahugushun|vahugushun]] || [[word:vahugukun|vahugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vahuguthuoro|vahuguthuoro]] || [[word:vahugujuoro|vahugujuoro]] || [[word:vahugushuoro|vahugushuoro]] || [[word:vahugukuoro|vahugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
